name: burpsuite-swiss-knife
description: Burp Suite Pro + Claude Code pentesting/bug-bounty toolkit. 215 MCP tools cover recon (amass / subfinder / httpx + wappalyzergo / gau / katana / wafw00f), web scan (nuclei / nikto / wpscan / dalfox / ffuf / arjun), exploit (sqlmap / commix / ysoserial gen), browser-driven crawl + screenshot via CloakBrowser stealth Chromium, auth-matrix (Subject × Object × Action), fuzz, race (cross-channel + pre-load widening), smuggling, OAuth/FIDO/payment flows, business-logic battery (probe_idempotency_key / probe_workflow_reorder / probe_line_item_mutation / probe_float_decimal_rounding / probe_cron_backfill / probe_content_type_switch / probe_quota_window_edge — Strix-derived), edge-vs-internal trust split (probe_internal_headers), privilege-revocation verification (probe_role_state_cleanup), monotonic-ID enumeration (UUIDv1/ULID/Snowflake — probe_id_monotonic), cross-transport IDOR confirmation (REST/GraphQL/WS — probe_cross_transport_idor), identifier harvest for IDOR pivots (harvest_identifiers), native JWT forge/crack (no external deps), login-bypass + MFA-bypass + session-lifecycle + reset-token entropy orchestrators, native CSRF/SSRF/SSTI/XXE/WebSocket-CSWSH/prototype-pollution orchestrators (SSTI engine modeled on SSTImap) where no third-party covers, security-research bundler (research_attack_vector — curated deep-dive prompts + HackerOne hacktivity + writeup-hub search URLs for Claude to WebFetch on demand), cross-engagement findings graph (build_findings_graph), mobile dynamic via Frida, 102-file knowledge base for adaptive probing, three-phase save-finding pipeline (replay → 7-question gate → persist), RCE-precondition detection, confirm_* exploit-to-confirm with tool-layer destructive denylist, map_tech_to_cves orchestrator (wappalyzergo → Shodan CVEDB → intel save).
author: TyrusRC

professional.notes: All features supported. Default target environment.

community.notes: Most tools work unchanged. Pro-only features (active scanner, Collaborator) gracefully degrade — operator supplies a callback URL for OOB tests, uses auto_probe / fuzz_parameter instead of scan_url, and accepts Intruder rate-throttling.

community_alternatives.active_scanner: auto_probe (knowledge-driven, runs via HTTP API), fuzz_parameter, fuzz_with_feedback
community_alternatives.collaborator_oob: Operator supplies a callback URL — interact.sh / webhook.site / requestcatcher.com — passed into payloads explicitly. Rule 9a: never fabricate domains.
community_alternatives.intruder_speed: concurrent_requests (Python-side concurrency through Burp proxy) bypasses Community throttling for legitimate parallel testing.

community.feature_detection: Call check_pro_features() at session start to confirm which Pro capabilities are available on the operator's instance.

alternative_installs.uv: uv pip install -e ./mcp-server && uv run python -m burpsuite_mcp

prompts.name: hunt-target
prompts.description: Run the standard authorized hunt loop on a target -- recon, probe, verify, save.

arguments.name: target
arguments.description: Target URL within authorized scope (e.g. https://example.com)

prompts.name: verify-finding
prompts.description: Walk a suspected finding through the 7-Question Validation Gate before save.

arguments.name: evidence
arguments.description: What was observed (status, length, marker, error)

prompts.name: triage-program
prompts.description: Set per-program policy (never_submit_remove / add, confidence_floor) + scope + override defaults for an engagement.

prompts.name: chain-findings
prompts.description: Walk saved findings and propose A→B→C chains that escalate to reportable impact.

arguments.name: domain
arguments.description: Target domain whose findings should be chained

prompts.name: save-finding-checklist
prompts.description: Pre-save checklist enforcing the three-phase pipeline (replay → assess → save).

resources.description: Persistent target intel (profile, endpoints, coverage, findings, fingerprint, patterns, notes).

safety_rules: Never test out-of-scope domains -- call check_scope first (Rule 1).
Never send destructive payloads (DROP TABLE, rm -rf, shutdown, format). Use benign detection payloads + Collaborator (Rule 5).
Use Burp Collaborator or operator-supplied callback for OOB tests -- never hardcode attacker domains (Rule 9a).
Save evidence (logger_index) BEFORE further exploitation -- targets get patched (Rule 12).
RCE-precondition probes detect only; real exploitation is operator-supervised (Copilot mode).
